title: nasturtium obtusum var. sphaerocarpum
intro: Nasturtium obtusum var. sphaerocarpum, a lesser-known variety of the nasturtium plant, is a flowering plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright flowers and edible leaves and stems. This plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Nasturtium obtusum var. sphaerocarpum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to support digestive health. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
